name: Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay
description: A capture-replay flaw exists when the design of the product makes it possible for a malicious user to sniff network traffic and bypass authentication by replaying it to the server. The attacker intercepts valid authentication credentials or tokens and resubmits them to gain unauthorized access.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (authentication tokens, credentials, session data) that flow to AUTH nodes (authentication verification) without a CONTROL mediator (replay protection, nonce validation, timestamp freshness check, sequence number verification) that ensures each authentication exchange is unique and cannot be reused.
